posts.title: JUST IN: Maryland Governor Wes Moore Blames Trump for Sewage Spill from His State into the Potomac After Trump Blasts Democrats for Spill

link_metadata.description: Maryland Governor Wes Moore has responded to President Trump’s criticism following a pipe burst last month, which sent hundreds of millions of gallons of sewage into the Potomac River.  As The Gateway Pundit reported, a sewage spill from Montgomery County, Maryland, north of DC, which began on January 19, 2026, was estimated to have discharged nearly 300 million gallons of sewage into the famed river.
link_metadata.title: JUST IN: Maryland Governor Wes Moore Blames Trump for Sewage Spill from His State into the Potomac After Trump Blasts Democrats for Spill | The Gateway Pundit | by Jordan Conradson
